changeSet.author: benedikt
changeSet.comment: Migrate existing competitions with type to competition_formats entries
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO competition_formats (competition_id, type, start_time) SELECT id, type, start_time FROM competitions WHERE type IS NOT NULL AND id NOT IN (SELECT competition_id FROM competition_formats);

changeSet.author: benedikt
changeSet.comment: Link existing registrations to their migrated format entries
changeSet.sql: UPDATE competition_registrations cr SET cr.competition_format_id = ( SELECT cf.id FROM competition_formats cf WHERE cf.competition_id = cr.competition_id LIMIT 1 ) WHERE cr.competition_format_id IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM competition_formats cf WHERE cf.competition_id = cr.competition_id );
